questions.question: 1. Which of the following is false in generalization?

answers.a: If a parent class is an interface, it is represented by a dashed line with a white arrow
answers.b: If a parent class is an abstract class, it is represented by a solid line with a white arrow
answers.c: A parent is a class is represented by a solid line with a black arrow
answers.d: The hierarchies are represented by an arrow pointing downwards towards a child

questions.question: 2. Identify the valid is-a relationship from the list below: 1)Country 2)Germany 3)Europe 4)Asia 5)Continent 6)Asian country 7)India 8)City 9)European country 10)China 11)Tamilnadu
3. Which of the following best describes the UML diagram generation process for the 'Release a Vehicle' use case?

answers.a: It involves identifying the actors and their roles in the use case.
answers.b: It involves creating a graphical representation of the interactions between the actors and the system, in a chronological order.
answers.c: It involves documenting the requirements of the use case.
answers.d: It involves creating a visual representation of the system's architecture and components.

questions.question: 4. What is represented by a solid line with an arrowhead between two classes in a class diagram?
5. What does the 'open diamond' symbol represent in a class diagram?
